title: alnus viridis var. microphylla
intro: Alnus viridis var. microphylla, also known as mountain green alder, is a variant of the green alder tree native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health issues due to its rich content of tannins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Alnus viridis var. microphylla include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain types of cancer. Traditional herbal preparations of Alnus viridis var. microphylla include tea infusions, infusions for baths, and topical applications, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
